name: gmail
description: Read Gmail profile, search messages, and inspect message metadata through the Anybox Gmail connector.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Gmail with Google OAuth and expose read-only mail tools.
interface.longDescription: A built-in plugin that uses the Anybox-managed Gmail connector for Google OAuth, a local stdio MCP wrapper, and runtime token injection.

permissions: Read the connected Gmail profile summary.
Search Gmail messages with Gmail search syntax.
Read Gmail message headers and snippets.
connectorRequirements.reason: Read-only Gmail access through the Anybox Gmail connector.
